creator: admin@vladiom.com.ua
text:
(In reply to Mark Linimon from comment #1)

root@vladiom:/usr/ports/devel/p5-Test-OpenLDAP # make -V OPENLDAP_VER
ld-elf.so.1: Shared object "libssl.so.9" not found, required by "ldapwhoami"

root@vladiom:/usr/ports/devel/p5-Test-OpenLDAP # make -V RUN_DEPENDS
p5-Data-UUID>0:devel/p5-Data-UUID  p5-perl-ldap>0:net/p5-perl-ldap  /usr/local/libexec/slapd:net/openldapld-elf.so.1: Shared object "libssl.so.9" not found, required by "ldapwhoami"-server perl5>=5.30.r1<5.31:lang/perl5.30
